ai_summary: BHEL will hold its 62nd Annual General Meeting (AGM) virtually on August 5, 2026, where shareholders will vote on a proposed final dividend of Rs. 1.40 per share (70%) for FY 2025-26. The Record Date for dividend eligibility is July 17, 2026, with payment expected by September 3, 2026, if approved. This announcement provides clarity on a material shareholder return and key corporate governance dates, with no immediate red flags apparent.
